'''Gallis-Tech''' was a vehicle manufacturing corporation. They produced the [[48 Roller wheel bike/Legends|48 Roller wheel bike]],<ref name="FDCR" /> and the militarized [[Scout Wheelbike]].<ref name="SWAJ6" />

{{Company-stub}}
